seoTitle: How to Create a Form on Monday.com (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Build and share custom forms in Monday.com by turning board columns into fields, adding conditional logic, and embedding on your site.
intro: Collecting requests, leads, or feedback shouldn't require a separate tool bolted onto your workflow. This guide shows how to build a form directly from your Monday.com board, customize its branding and logic, and share it publicly or embed it on your website so submissions flow straight into your workspace.

steps.heading: Add the Form view to your board
steps.body: Navigate to your master board and add the "Form" view from the view directory.

steps.heading: Let columns auto-map to questions
steps.body: Monday.com automatically turns existing columns like Text, Status, Files, and Dates into dynamic form questions.

steps.heading: Customize branding and layout
steps.body: Rename questions, add descriptions, upload your company logo, and adjust the background theme.

steps.heading: Add conditional logic
steps.body: Set rules to show or hide specific questions based on an applicant's previous answers.

steps.heading: Configure required fields and post-submission actions
steps.body: Mark fields as required and set up a custom success message or redirect URL after submission.

steps.heading: Share your form
steps.body: Publish the form using its public link or generate a website embed code, and track incoming submissions as they arrive.

faq.question: Do I have to manually build form fields from scratch?
faq.answer: No, Monday.com automatically maps your existing board columns like Text, Status, Files, and Dates into form questions.

faq.question: Can I show different questions based on earlier answers?
faq.answer: Yes, conditional logic rules let you show or hide specific questions depending on how an applicant answered a previous one.

faq.question: Can I embed the form on my own website?
faq.answer: Yes, you can generate a web embed code in addition to sharing the public form link.

faq.question: Can submitters stay anonymous?
faq.answer: Yes, you can activate anonymous responses and configure submitter tracking based on your needs.
